formulas.variant_a: entry=open(first bar t>=block_ts), exit=close(first bar t>=block_ts+H); long PnL=(exit-entry)*qty short PnL=(entry-exit)*qty
formulas.variant_b: entry=(high+low)/2 of entry bar, exit=close at horizon
formulas.variant_c: entry open adjusted by adverse slippage 0.0005 on entry
formulas.fees: none applied (blocked rows lack fee schedule); sensitivity: add per-share fee in follow-on
